mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, memo, difficulty, xp, completed, created_at, completed_at FROM quests WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quests(user_id, title, memo, difficulty, xp, completed, created_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{memo}, #{difficulty}, #{xp}, #{completed}, NOW(), #{completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE quests SET completed = #{completed}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{completed} = TRUE THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
